_comment: Generic open-join agency for fire departments without a dedicated EMS program. Provides first responder-level medical care pending EMS arrival. No provider level ceiling — student operates at their own license level.

service_type.notes: Fire department without a dedicated EMS program. Crew provides first responder medical care until EMS arrives. Does not transport patients.

als_dispatch.notes: EMS is dispatched on all medical calls. Fire crew initiates care and prepares for EMS arrival and patient transfer.

provider_levels.primary_display: Unrestricted — student selects their own license level
provider_levels.notes: No agency-enforced ceiling. The student's self-reported license level determines scope.

ai_prompt_context: This is a fire department first response unit without a dedicated EMS program. This unit does NOT transport patients — EMS is dispatched separately. Provide first responder medical care at the student's license level until EMS arrives. Follow base Michigan protocols for the student's provider level. No agency-specific SOPs or MCA BLS expansions are active.
